title: Solo Leveling
description: Sung Jinwoo was a D-rank hunter with the lowest-tier powers. One day, he got the chance to climb an unusual dungeon. What he finds inside the dungeon changes everything.

title: That Time I Got Reincarnated as a Slime
description: A Japanese man finds himself reincarnated as a slime in an alternate world. With the power to devour anything and copy its abilities, he aims to create a peaceful world.

title: Demon Slayer
description: Tanjiro returns from a charcoal delivery to find his family slaughtered by demons, with only his sister Nezuko surviving but transformed into a demon herself. His journey to find a cure begins.

title: One Piece Volume 62
description: Join Monkey D. Luffy and his crew as they continue their adventure across the Grand Line in search of the legendary treasure, One Piece.

title: The Beginning After The End - Divergence
description: Arthur Leywin returns to a world he once lived, destined to face extraordinary challenges with his unique abilities.

title: My bias gets on the last train
description: A heartwarming tale of love blooming amidst the bustling cityscape.

title: The greteast estate developer
description: A hilarious collection of comedy stories that will make you laugh out loud.

title: Slice of College Life
description: Follow the everyday adventures of a group of college friends navigating student life.
